entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Workflow Trigger Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE WorkflowLaunch PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <WorkflowLaunch status="failed" workflowName="HR Source Lifecycle Event - Joiner" workflowRef="HR Source Lifecycle Event - Joiner"> <Messages> <Message key="Exception occurred while executing the RPCRequest: Errors returned from IQService. "The object already exists. The object already exists. 00000524: UpdErr: DSID-031A1261, problem 6005 (ENTRY_EXISTS), data 0 00000524: UpdErr: DSID-031A1261, problem 6005 (ENTRY_EXISTS), data 0 . HRESULT:[0x80071392] For identity: CN=Mahesh Nattali,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"" type="Error"/> </Messages> <TaskResultRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.TaskResult" id="HR Source Lifecycle Event - Joiner - 5" name="HR Source Lifecycle Event - Joiner - 5"/> </TaskResultRef> <WorkflowCaseRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.WorkflowCase" id="c0a81d89900a1b6081900b0032b700b8" name="HR Source Lifecycle Event - Joiner - 5"/> </WorkflowCaseRef> </WorkflowLaunch>
